titleStmt.title: Kuwait 2022 – Questionnaire – Speaker 6 (Alone) (Part 1)
WIBARAB Corpus
titleStmt.funder: Funded by the European Research Council under the Grant Agreement 101020127

publicationStmt.distributor: Austrian Center for Digital Humanities and Cultural Heritage

recording.p: Recorded during Kuwait Fieldwork Campaign Gunda Kinzl 2022

prefixDef.p: Private URIs using the teiCorpusHeader prefix are pointers to any element in the WIBARAB teiCorpus document.
Private URIs using the share prefix are pointers to audio file residing on the WIBARAB network share.
Private URIs using the geo prefix are pointers to the xml:id attribute on a place element in VICAV Geodata list.
Private URIs using the dmp prefix are pointers to the xml:id attribute on an element in the WIBARAB DMP document..
Private URIs using the zotid prefix are pointers to the xml:id attribute on a biblStruct element in the TEI export of the VICAV Zotero Group library.
Private URIs using the sources prefix are pointers to the xml:id attribute on an element in the WIBARAB list of sources.

spanGrp.span: There's no problem
What did you put in it?
My husband wears a white shirt and we have a white car
Yes, "finīla"... Look, "finīla, qamīṣ, tī-šērt" all of these names are used for shirt
Can you repeat?
They rode in on six white camels
When I graduated my mother’s face turned white with pride
I don’t like this black shirt nor the black car
This are the same things, for example "hāḏi, hāḏa, haḏāk", they are all demonstratives
The sheikh of the tribe Walad ʕAli has, pardon me, what did you say, how many?
The sheikh of the tribe Walad Abu ʕAli has 5 black stallions and 5 black mares
What's the difference between a "ḥiṣān" and a "faris", do you know?
There is a difference, but I am not so knowledgable about this
My wife bought herself a pink shirt and a pink bag
Do you also use the word "zahri" for pink or just "wardi"?
No we don't use "zahri" normally, we only use "wardi"
She is wearing grey pants
I like this orange shirt
The colour of soil?
We call it "trābi" (soil colour), yes "trābi"
The colour of wood normally? Brown, wood-coloured, even for it
The pastures are green in spring
The sky is blue today
The tomatoes are red
There are 13 students in the class, but only 13 are in the classroom
We will visit you (pl.f.) in 2 months.
There is no quarrel between us
They arrived before midnight
She came with her daughters
